3195330.name: The Reverend
3195330.description:
As a reverend ride the elevator to hell and clear out all demons in the way. Clean up hell for once and for all. Beware of going outside of the elevator. Any living creatures cannot survive from the burning hell.
But no worries, God blessed arsenals and sacred powers embedded to your roman collar will be enough to clean out hell.

features :

  • A Rogue-like horde shooter with minimal movement.
  • Switch weapon to reload
  • God given anti-demon powers
  • Weapons with its own unique features.
  • A lot of power ups to upgrade your weapons.
  • Different themed hell and demons each stage.
